queue.title: Residue Trajectory Placement
queue.description: Tests whether residue accumulates at trajectory positions during rollout, not only at the final executed step.
queue.status_reason: Experiment script not yet written (P2 backlog)

queue.title: E1/E2 Timescale Ablation
queue.description: Ablates the E1 (LSTM slow predictor) vs E2 (fast rollout) timescale separation. Tests whether the two-speed architecture improves latent stability.
queue.status_reason: Experiment script not yet written (P2 backlog)

queue.title: Commitment Boundary Token Reclassification
queue.description: Validates that REE's commitment boundary correctly reclassifies pre-commit simulation errors as post-commit realised errors.
queue.status_reason: Experiment script not yet written (P2 backlog)

queue.title: Control Completion Requirement
queue.description: Tests MECH-057: whether REE's control plane requires action completion before new precision updates are admitted.
queue.status_reason: Needs redesign after JEPA decoupling (P3 backlog)

completed.title: Control Plane Precision Separation
completed.description: Tests whether E3 score dispersion (confidence proxy) and E1 prediction error are independent signals, and whether routing them separately reduces harm.
completed.result_summary: |corr(dispersion, PE)| = 0.067 (<0.30 threshold) — signals independent | SEPARATED last-Q harm 0.663 vs MERGED 0.875 — separation beneficial
